title: Aptlantis Studio Public Data Manifest
description: Crawler-friendly catalog of public Aptlantis Studio datasets, schemas, and evidence asset groups.

crawlerPolicy.summary: Aptlantis Studio welcomes search indexing, archival capture, AI crawler indexing, and public metadata inspection for the files listed here.
restrictions: Do not treat this manifest as a security audit.
Do not infer release verification unless a listed evidence artifact explicitly records it.
Do not republish private data if it is accidentally discovered outside these public paths.

datasets.title: Project Portfolio
datasets.description: Main Aptlantis project catalog used by the portfolio dashboard and project detail pages.
datasets.crawlerUse: Index project titles, summaries, tags, public evidence paths, and stated missing pieces.

datasets.title: CityHall Frameworks
datasets.description: Structured framework relationship data for CityHall and Aptlantis governance explanations.
datasets.crawlerUse: Index framework names, relationships, summaries, and public governance context.

datasets.title: Coding Against The Grain Experiments
datasets.description: Catalog seed for unusual programming experiments, constrained systems, esolang notes, and wrong-tool teaching examples.
datasets.crawlerUse: Index experiment titles, constraints, media, status, and teaching purpose.

datasets.title: Linux Genealogy Expanded Dataset
datasets.description: Hierarchical Linux distribution genealogy dataset used by the interactive Linux Genealogy page.
datasets.crawlerUse: Index distribution names, parent-child relationships, years, tags, and public genealogy facts.

datasets.title: SVG Asset Registry
datasets.description: Running catalog of public SVG assets and SESM metadata used by the site and embedding service.
datasets.updateCadence: when SVG assets are added or regenerated
datasets.crawlerUse: Index SVG asset paths, roles, hashes, and embedded SESM metadata expectations.

schemas.title: Aptlantis Studio Manifest Schema
schemas.description: JSON Schema for this public data manifest.

schemas.title: Incoming Message Schema
schemas.description: JSON Schema describing the internal shape of contact and email intake records.
schemas.crawlerUse: Use to understand the intended public schema for contact intake records. Do not infer that submitted private messages are public data.

schemas.title: SVG Asset Schema
schemas.description: JSON Schema for public SVG asset metadata records without MongoDB storage assumptions.
schemas.crawlerUse: Use to validate or interpret individual records in the SVG asset registry.

schemas.title: SVG Asset Registry Schema
schemas.description: JSON Schema for the crawlable registry of public SVG assets and SESM metadata.

evidenceAssetGroups.title: Project Media Evidence
evidenceAssetGroups.description: Project-specific screenshots, videos, captions, and visual evidence assets.
evidenceAssetGroups.source: Aptlantis Studio public project evidence folders
evidenceAssetGroups.crawlerUse: Index public screenshots and videos only with surrounding project context.

evidenceAssetGroups.title: Identity And Logo Assets
evidenceAssetGroups.description: Public Aptlantis and project logo assets used by the site. The SVG asset registry is the canonical metadata catalog for these assets.
evidenceAssetGroups.crawlerUse: Use for link previews, project identity context, and visual cataloging.

evidenceAssetGroups.title: Site OpenGraph Card
evidenceAssetGroups.description: Primary social preview image for Aptlantis Studio link previews.
evidenceAssetGroups.crawlerUse: Use as the primary preview image for Aptlantis Studio pages when page-specific images are unavailable.

evidenceAssetGroups.title: Linux Genealogy Generated SVG Map
evidenceAssetGroups.description: Static radial SVG visualization generated from the public Linux genealogy JSON dataset.
evidenceAssetGroups.updateCadence: regenerate when the Linux genealogy dataset changes
evidenceAssetGroups.crawlerUse: Index as a visual map of the public Linux genealogy dataset. Use the JSON dataset as the canonical machine-readable source.

evidenceAssetGroups.title: Linux Genealogy Map Node Coordinates
evidenceAssetGroups.description: Generated coordinate map used to place clickable node overlays on the static Linux genealogy SVG.
evidenceAssetGroups.updateCadence: regenerate when the Linux genealogy dataset changes
evidenceAssetGroups.crawlerUse: Use as supporting coordinate metadata for the generated SVG map. The expanded JSON remains the canonical dataset.

evidenceAssetGroups.title: Aptlantis Studio PGP Public Key
evidenceAssetGroups.description: Public PGP key advertised from security.txt for encrypted contact or verification workflows.
evidenceAssetGroups.crawlerUse: Index as public security/contact metadata. Do not infer code-signing or release verification from this key alone.
